content.problemStatement:
Chef was given an integer input N.

He wants to write a code using `while` loops to output the sum of all integers from 1 to NNN. 

Help him complete the code .

code.Python3:
# Solution as follows

n = int(input())
sum = 0
i = 1

while i <= n:
    sum = sum + i
    i = i+1
    
print(sum)
